commit.message:
Update prompt for Supply & Demand zones + ICT session boxes

Claude now knows exactly how to read the chart:

Supply & Demand Zones:
- Dark red = FRESH supply (untested, high-prob short entries)
- Light pink = TESTED supply (weaker)
- Dark green = FRESH demand (untested, high-prob long entries)
- Light green = TESTED demand (weaker)
- Entry at zone edge, SL behind zone

ICT Sessions:
- Yellow = Asia, Blue = London, Red/Purple = NY
- Blue vertical lines = day break lines

Trade Placement:
- SELL LIMIT at fresh supply zone edge, SL above zone
- BUY LIMIT at fresh demand zone edge, SL below zone
- SELL STOP below tested demand about to break
- TP targets nearest opposite zone
- No trade if price is between zones with no setup

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: forbids mechanism, binary guards, out-of-range critical flag

Fix 1 — forbids field on AnalysisPlugin interface:
- Added forbids?: DataCapability[] to AnalysisPlugin (types.ts)
- AnalysisRegistry.query() now enforces: ALL requires met AND
  NONE of forbids present. Undefined/empty forbids = no exclusion.

Fix 2 — Applied forbids to 4 plugins:
- RegressionPlugin: forbids ['binary'] — prevents OLS on 0/1 outcome
- DriverPlugin: forbids ['binary'] — same protection
- SignificancePlugin: forbids ['binary'] — prevents KW on binary data
- PostHocPlugin: forbids ['binary'] — prevents MW on binary groups

Fix 3 — Out-of-range values raised to critical:
- checkCollapsedCategories now checks out-of-range BEFORE the
  collapsed-category early return
- Values outside declared scale range (e.g. 7 in a 1-5 scale):
  severity 'critical', confidence 1.0, explicit warning message
- Values within range but missing scale points: severity 'info' (unchanged)

Edge case: the original check returned null when uniqueNums >= expected,
which skipped the out-of-range check entirely. Fixed by moving
out-of-range detection before the early return.

12 new tests:
- forbids mechanism (4): exclude when present, include when absent,
  backward compat with no forbids, undefined treated as empty
- plugin forbids (4): regression+binary, significance+binary,
  posthoc+binary, driver+binary
- out-of-range (2): critical when values outside range,
  info when within range but collapsed
- existing forbids (2): regression included without binary,
  significance included without binary

344/344 tests. Zero regressions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

perf: fix CLS 0.306 et optimiser LCP

- Déplacer Commitments à l'intérieur du footer (pas au-dessus)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Read levels from chart screenshots, not TwelveData API

Problem: TwelveData PDH/PDL didn't match user's broker data.
The chart already has ICT session boxes, VRVP, order blocks with
the correct levels from the user's broker.

Changes:
- Removed daily OHLC fetch from TwelveData (saves 1 API call)
- Removed PDH/PDL/PWH/PWL from indicator data
- Removed VWAP, BBands, Ichimoku, SuperTrend from formatter
- Only ATR(14) and ADX/DI remain (can't be read from screenshots)
- Updated prompt: tells Claude to read EXACT prices from the chart
  session boxes, VRVP, order blocks, and horizontal levels
- Explicitly says DO NOT make up or approximate levels

TwelveData now: 4 API calls (ATR, ADX, +DI, -DI) instead of 9

commit.message:
perf: audit complet — performance, accessibilité, SEO, images et vidéos

- Supprimer Google Translate (500ms TBT + 22 cookies tiers)
- Compresser vidéos hero (3.5MB→107KB) et découpe laser (4.5MB→470KB)
- Compresser images WebP (banner 56→13KB, accessoires 35→9KB, poster 55→28KB)
- Ajouter preload Braserobanner + fetchPriority high (LCP)
- Remplacer hero vidéo par poster image + chargement différé (HeroVideo)
- Lazy load vidéo découpe laser avec IntersectionObserver (LazyVideo)
- Passer GTM de afterInteractive à lazyOnload (-230ms TBT)
- Corriger contraste texte #CD853F→#8B5A2B sur bg-[#f6f1e9] (ratio 5.2:1)
- Corriger touch targets dots carousel (padding p-3)
- Corriger heading order (h3→span dans category/promo tiles)
- Corriger footer contraste et touch targets liens
- Déplacer Commitments du layout vers Footer (fix CLS 0.326→0)
- Ajouter og:image à 7 pages, corriger manifest.json
- Ajouter CSP style-src pour gstatic.com
- Corriger middleware console.log condition inversée
- Ajouter error.tsx et loading.tsx
- Fix responsive: AccessoryGrid, FilterPanel, NewsletterSignup, Footer

Résultats Lighthouse mobile (production):
  Performance: 33→73 | Accessibility: 87→100 | Best Practices: 73→92 | SEO: 100
  TBT: 1680ms→230ms | CLS: 0.308→0 | LCP: 12.9s→6.0s

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: add comprehensive backtest report with optimization results

Complete documentation of 5-year backtest: 7 bug fixes, 6 optimization
tests, final recommendation (no re-entry), and deployment notes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: disable re-entry after optimization testing — improves all metrics

Ran 5 optimization backtests (no re-entry, SL 25%, no DTE 1, loss -5000,
re-entry profit-only). No re-entry was the clear winner:
- Net P&L: Rs 9.50L → Rs 10.38L (+9%)
- Sharpe: 3.47 → 3.85, Calmar: 10.58 → 13.88
- Max DD: -89K → -75K, Win Rate: 58.8% → 61.6%

Applied REENTRY_MAX_PER_DAY = 0 to both production and backtest config.
Added optimization configs, runner script, and all test results.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Bazaarvoice display code and add locale

- Add displayCode=18587_8_0-da_dk param to all BV API calls (old
  passkey was mapped to defunct display code 18587_6_0)
- Add locale=da_DK to BV API params
- BV_DISPLAY_CODE env var added for future overrides
- Confirmed 12 reviews returned for SCCSC02 (avg 4.7/5)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix capture: single tab, simple delays, unlimited storage

Problems fixed:
- Was opening 4 tabs simultaneously — now uses 1 tab, navigates
- waitForChart was hanging — replaced with simple 5s delay
- chrome.storage.local had 10MB limit — added unlimitedStorage
- Tabs weren't closing — now always closes in finally-like flow
- Added detailed console.log for every step

Flow now:
1. Opens ONE TradingView tab
2. For each TF: navigate to URL → wait 5s → screenshot → next
3. Close tab → focus back to app → save to storage
4. Content script polls storage → sends to web app

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Features: interactive loan/savings/mortgage calculators, multi-step
application form, member dashboard with transactions, accordion FAQ,
branch locator, responsive mobile nav. Static export for Cloudflare Pages.

fix: correct API auth redirect assertions in E2E tests

Replace status code checks (400-499) with URL checks (/auth/login)

API requests. Playwright follows the redirect, so final status is 200.

Single-page layout: left sidebar (news/watchlist) + right (capture/chat)

Left sidebar (3 cols):
- Watchlist (click to switch symbol)
- News Sentiment dashboard (live)
- Analysis History (collapsible)
- Pending Orders

Right main area (9 cols):

AnalysisDisplay import, BarChart2/ImageIcon/Trash2 icons

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix screenshot delivery: use chrome.storage polling, default XAUUSD

Root cause: chrome.tabs.sendMessage to the original tab failed because
the tab lost focus during capture. The message channel broke.

Fix: Use chrome.storage.local as a message buffer:
- Background stores screenshots in chrome.storage when done
- Content script polls chrome.storage every 1s for results
- When status='done', grabs screenshots and posts to web app
- Clears storage after delivery

Also:
- Added 'storage' permission to manifest
- Default symbol set to XAUUSD on AI page
- Default risk mode set to % Risk at 2%

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: remove device frame and DemoBar — native full-screen PWA

fake StatusBar) so the app behaves as a real native PWA that fills
the full viewport with proper safe-area support.

commit.message:
fix: prevent false-positive update notifications on every page load

Remove skipWaiting() from SW install handler so new workers wait
instead of immediately taking control. UI now sends SKIP_WAITING
message only when user confirms, then reloads on controllerchange.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: comprehensive bug sweep — 3 issues resolved

Critical:
- transcribeAudioFile: engine stuck at .transcribing state forever when
  whisperService.transcribe() returns false (Whisper busy/unavailable);
  now properly completes lifecycle and resets to .ready

Major:
- Missing .onChange(of: settings.enableSilenceTrim) in DexDictateApp;
  toggling 'Trim Leading/Trailing Silence' had no effect until popover
  was closed and reopened — ExperimentFlags now updates immediately

Minor:
- CustomCommandsManager and AppInsertionOverridesManager: load() triggered
  didSet { save() } on every app launch, causing a redundant UserDefaults
  write; guarded with isLoading flag

commit.message:
fix: cache-busting + visible card backgrounds + ambient glow

Root cause: browser served cached old CSS/JS files, AND glass-bg
(4% white) was invisible on dark background — visually identical to
the old bg2. Fixed by:

- Adding ?v=timestamp to all CSS/JS references in index.html
- Vercel headers: must-revalidate for CSS/JS files
- Cards use solid bg2 instead of invisible glass-bg
- Stat boxes use bg3 (visible) instead of glass-bg
- Glass border opacity increased to 12% (was 8%)
- Ambient glow orb enlarged + pulsing animation
- All remaining 14px radius replaced with 20px

commit.message:
Chrome Extension for auto TradingView capture + simplified indicators

Chrome Extension ("AI Trader - Chart Capture"):
- Manifest V3, works with user's own TradingView session
- Opens TradingView tabs at 4 timeframes (5m, 15m, 1H, 4H)
- Waits for chart + indicators to render
- Screenshots each, sends back to web app
- Uses user's saved layout/indicators (ICT Zones, VRVP etc)
- Content script bridges web app <-> extension

Web App:
- "Auto Capture (4 TFs)" button in AiChart component
- Detects if extension is installed, shows install prompt if not
- "Manual Screenshot" button kept as fallback
- Auto-captured screenshots appear in list, ready to analyze

TwelveData Indicators Simplified:
- Only fetch ATR(14), ADX/DI, daily OHLC (5 API calls)
- Dropped VWAP, BBands, Ichimoku, SuperTrend
  (user puts these on their TradingView chart instead)
- Saves API quota for multi-TF analysis

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add auto-update feature via GitHub Releases API

- Add UpdateChecker that polls GitHub API on launch and every 24h
- Show update status in menu bar: available / downloading / ready to install
- Install by downloading Linkmux.zip, then replacing /Applications/Linkmux.app
  via detached shell script after app exits
- Add @MainActor to AppDelegate and UpdateChecker for safe concurrency
- Fix Info.plist version to 0.0.2 to align with current release tag
- Fix release.yml: add ServiceManagement framework, stamp version from tag,
  include UpdateChecker.swift in build

items mapping, guest notes generation, and edge cases.

Phase C2 complete — all Phase C hooks extracted.

Add security headers, optimize bundle by moving page to server component

Security: add X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy,
X-DNS-Prefetch-Control, and Permissions-Policy headers to all routes.

Performance: refactor page.tsx from client to server component so the
full 560+ concept dataset stays server-side. Client receives only
pre-computed categories, a total count, and 30 lightweight suggestion
summaries. Hoist verified badge SVG out of ConceptCard render loop.

Add individual project deep links via hash routing

auto-opens the project detail view.

新增图片编辑、视频播放、相册、资料库等多项功能

- 图片编辑浮窗：矩形/圆形/箭头/画笔/马赛克/文字/裁剪，完成后复制到剪贴板
- 图片/视频统一预览浮窗：根据内容类型自动切换按钮和控制条
- 视频控制条：播放/暂停、进度拖拽、倍速(1/1.5/2/3x)、音量
- 相册浮窗：图片/视频tab、过期天数、筛选(全部/常用/我的)、上传、拖拽多选、双击预览
- 资料库浮窗：公众号/视频号/小程序/地理位置/文件/直播6个tab，搜索、筛选、右键删除
- 隐藏窗口截图：模拟Windows桌面+飞书窗口
- 图片发送"来自资料库"角标、图片压缩机制
- 浮窗层级管理：新打开的窗口自动置顶，Toast永远最上层

- 旋转连续累加不回弹

Add King's Gambit d5 counter-thrust deviation + fix Falkbeer index

After e4 e5 f4 exf4 Nf3, Black plays d5 instead of d6 — attacks the
undefended e4 pawn. Correct response: exd5 (capture first). Also
fixed the Falkbeer deviation index from 5 to 3 (it occurs before the
gambit is accepted).

fix: replace ScriptProcessorNode with BufferSource + fix favicon 404

1. Ambient sound: replaced deprecated ScriptProcessorNode with a looping
   AudioBufferSourceNode + lowpass filter. Same brown noise output,
   no console deprecation warning.

2. Favicon: added <link rel="icon" href="data:,"> to all 17 HTML pages
   to prevent 404 requests for favicon.ico.

fix: add total_experience to vapi-variables + transcript to save-artifacts

  returns it as total_experience in variableValues (was missing → 0)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(phase6): analyst price target contradiction penalty (M_target)

Add multiplier M_target to Phase 6 sizing chain:
  price 20-50% above analyst consensus → ×0.85
  price >50% above analyst consensus → ×0.60
Fetch target from FMP price-target-consensus in Phase 4 (async gather,
7th slot — no sequential overhead).

Addresses systematic losses on tickers flagged as contradictions
in Company Intel (SEDG -$360, VICR -$440, OLN, EQT pattern).

Config: target_overshoot_enabled, target_overshoot_threshold (0.20),
        target_severe_threshold (0.50).
12 tests in test_target_penalty.py.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
